title: Bounded Public Static Surface API Origin Remediation Execution
objective: Execute the bounded source-local remediation slice that removes hardcoded localhost API bases from the public static Operations Visibility surfaces while preserving the explicit boundary that public-host API availability is still unresolved.
execution_scope: Patch the four PM review JavaScript assets to derive their schedule API base from a local-vs-public origin-aware branch.
Patch the PM approval surface and lead surface HTML assets to derive reads and mutations API bases from the same local-vs-public origin-aware branch.
Leave backend deployment, routing, and Next env wiring unchanged.
Validate with the existing PM pure-logic tests plus a targeted source-pattern check.

validation: Targeted source-pattern check confirmed the origin-aware branch is present in all six remediated files
execution_evidence.diagnostic_boundary: lead-ops/index.html still reports pre-existing meta-in-body HTML diagnostics unrelated to this change
execution_evidence.live_data_boundary: direct public-host /api/v1 probes still return 404, so this packet removes wrong-origin behavior but does not claim live-data success

next_packet_candidate: Olares Dev Residency 026 - Packet 022 Closeout Through Packet 025 API-Origin Remediation Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-05 as a bounded source-local remediation packet. Packet 025 removed hardcoded localhost API bases from the public PM review and lead static surfaces by switching them to a local-vs-public origin-aware branch, passed the admitted PM pure-logic tests, and preserved the truthful boundary that public-host API routes still 404 on direct probe.
next_action: Execute Packet 026 to publish the local Packet 022 closeout through Packet 025 remediation authority set and source changes before any post-remediation public-host check depends on them.
